mapper.select:
/* 템플릿 리스트 조회 */ SELECT ID, STORE_ID, LOCATION_ID, API_SVR_NAME, SNS_TYPE, TMPL_CODE, TMPL_NAME, TMPL_TITLE, TMPL_CONTENT, WEB_BTN, USE_YN, DESCRITION, CREATE_USER, CREATE_DATE, UPDATE_USER, UPDATE_DATE FROM template_mst WHERE 1 = 1
AND TMPL_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
AND TMPL_CODE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{tmpltCode}, '%')
ORDER BY UPDATE_DATE DESC

/** 알림톡 전송할 USER 리스트 */ SELECT 'clubbboy@naver.com' USER_ID , '01042467729' PHONE , '윤정호' NAME , '10' TOT_CNT union all SELECT '4406647973' USER_ID , '+82 10-2902-0580' PHONE , '오이전송테스트' NAME , '11' TOT_CNT
